case_title: SAIDY SYDNEY VS PRESIDENT CHEVROLET INC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,750.00 FILED BY SAIDY SYDNEY AS TO DEFENDANT PRESIDENT CHEVROLET INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-14-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PRESIDENT CHEVROLET INC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAIDY SYDNEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRESIDENT CHEVROLET INC $2,750.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,750.00, PROVIDED PLTF RETURNS THE 87 VOLKSWAGEN BY 5PM 2/14/92, DEFT IS TO REFUND $2750 BY 2/18/92 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
